self = , driver = @allure.story("Negative - Duplicate Add to Cart Handling") @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL) def test_duplicate_add_to_cart(self, driver): with allure.step("Open Nykaa website"): driver.get(Config.BASE_URL) assert "nykaa" in driver.current_url.lower(), \ "Nykaa website did not open" home = HomePage(driver) hair = HairPage(driver) cart = CartPage(driver) with allure.step("Search shampoo product"): home.search_product("shampoo") results = driver.find_elements( By.XPATH, "//a[contains(@href,'/p/')]" ) assert len(results) > 0, \ "No products found" with allure.step("Open first product"): hair.select_first_product() assert "/p/" in driver.current_url.lower(), \ "Product page did not open" with allure.step("Add product to bag first time"): cart.add_to_bag() first_count = WebDriverWait(driver, 20).until( EC.presence_of_element_located( ( By.XPATH, "//span[contains(@class,'count')]" ) ) ) assert first_count is not None, \ "First add to bag failed" with allure.step("Add same product to bag second time"): > cart.add_to_bag() tests\all_tests.py:331: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
